pattern.name: null_pointer_exception
pattern.description: Null pointer or undefined access without checking
pattern.fix: Add null/undefined checks before accessing properties

pattern.name: unhandled_promise_rejection
pattern.description: Async operations without proper error handling
pattern.fix: Wrap async operations in try-catch blocks

pattern.name: infinite_loop
pattern.fix: Ensure all loops have proper termination conditions

pattern.name: memory_leak
pattern.fix: Clean up event listeners, intervals, and subscriptions

pattern.name: race_condition
unnecessary_re_render
inefficient_algorithm
pattern.description: O(n²) or worse complexity where O(n) is possible
pattern.fix: Use more efficient data structures and algorithms

pattern.name: redundant_computation
pattern.description: Calculating the same value multiple times

pattern.name: unnecessary_api_calls
pattern.description: Making API calls that could be cached

pattern.name: ambiguous_variable_names
pattern.description: Variable names that don't describe their purpose

pattern.name: inconsistent_naming
pattern.description: Mixing naming conventions in the same codebase
pattern.fix: Follow consistent naming conventions throughout the codebase

pattern.name: magic_numbers
pattern.fix: Use named constants instead of magic numbers

pattern.name: boolean_prefix_misuse
prefer_const
pattern.description: Using let when const would be more appropriate
pattern.fix: Use const for variables that are never reassigned

pattern.name: no_unused_vars
pattern.fix: Remove unused variables or prefix with underscore if intentional

pattern.name: prefer_template_literals
pattern.description: Using string concatenation instead of template literals
